scores.correctness_notes: The agent provides a Python API walkthrough, but the gold standard focuses on the data schema (application-data and unit-data in the databag) that the requirer must populate. The agent completely omits this schema. Additionally, the gold standard recommends v1.ingress while the agent leads with v2.ingress. The gold standard explicitly notes that charmlibs docs cover interface specs/data contracts, not the Python library API — the agent inverts this focus.
scores.hallucination_notes: IngressPerAppRequirer exists in the traefik-k8s library and on.ready/on.revoked are real events. However, the exact import names IngressPerAppReadyEvent and IngressPerAppRevokedEvent are uncertain — the actual event class names in v2 may differ. The per-unit variant section uses v1.ingress_per_unit which is plausible but not verified against gold standard. Minor uncertainty warrants a 1.
